problem.title: Egypt's finishing market has real problems
problem.subtitle: Homeowners lose time and money every day because of four real problems.
problem.card1Desc: Counterfeit cables and substandard wiring cause fires and failures years later.
problem.card1Solution: Every product on Malaaz passes certified quality tests before it is listed.
problem.card2Desc: Customers can't tell 2.5mm from 4mm wire and rely entirely on the contractor's word.
problem.card2Solution: The AI Engineer calculates exact specs and prevents manipulation.
problem.card3Desc: The same product sells at one price in Ataba and a much higher price in Nasr City.
problem.card3Solution: Transparent pricing from the closest verified trader in your area.
problem.card4Desc: The fear that costs spiral out of control and savings disappear.
problem.card4Solution: The Cost Simulator shows your total finishing cost before you buy a single item.

howItWorks.title: Three steps from bare walls to a finished home
howItWorks.step1Desc: Share a photo of your room or floor plan. The AI analyzes the space and layout.
howItWorks.step2Desc: Calculates lighting distribution, socket placement, exact specifications, and picks compatible products.
howItWorks.step3Desc: A ready cart at the best prices from the closest verified traders in your area.

traders.title: Join Malaaz as a Trader
traders.bigDesc: Reach millions of homeowners across Egypt without spending on marketing.
traders.smallDesc: Free POS and inventory management system for your shop, plus visibility on Malaaz in front of customers.

lab.title: The Lab
lab.subtitle: We do not sell a product we have not tested. Every week we run live tests on products — streamed publicly.

about.title: Building the future of finishing in Egypt
about.story: Malaaz started from real frustration — we watched homeowners lose thousands because of dishonest contractors, counterfeit products, and chaotic pricing. We decided to solve it at the root: with technology, transparency, and verified traders.
about.vision: Every Egyptian able to finish their home with confidence, quality, and fair pricing.
about.mission: Digitize Egypt's finishing market by connecting homeowners with verified traders and AI that guides them every step of the way.

aboutPage.headline:
Building the future of
finishing in Egypt
aboutPage.lead: Malaaz is not a store — it is an AI technical consultant that gives you an engineer's brain, an expert's integrity, and a wholesaler's price.
aboutPage.story1: The idea came from real frustration. We watched homeowners lose thousands — not because of high prices, but because of technical ignorance and blind trust in contractors who answered to no one.
aboutPage.story2: We decided to fix it at the root. Not by importing a Western model that does not understand the Ataba market, but by building a platform designed for Egypt from day one — Arabic-first and offline-capable.
aboutPage.quote: We give you an engineer's brain, an expert's integrity, and a wholesaler's price.
aboutPage.pillar1Text: Every Egyptian able to finish their home with confidence, quality, and fair pricing — with no technical expertise required.
aboutPage.pillar2Text: Digitize Egypt's finishing market by connecting homeowners with verified traders and AI that guides them every step of the way.
aboutPage.pillar3Text: We do not just sell products — we sell certainty. Every decision on the platform is backed by data, quality tests, and transparent pricing.
aboutPage.moatsSub: Three structural advantages that compound as we grow — neither Amazon nor Noon can build them.
aboutPage.moat1Desc: Because we control the POS system at the small trader level, we know exactly what sits on a shelf in every neighborhood in Egypt.
aboutPage.moat2Desc: Once a trader uploads their stock and uses our system for daily receipts, we become their operating system. Leaving costs more than staying.
aboutPage.moat3Desc: Our AI assistant runs on live inventory from hundreds of traders in real time — accurate and immediately actionable recommendations.
aboutPage.teamSub: A small team solving a big problem.
aboutPage.ctaSub: Whether you own an apartment waiting to be finished or run a shop looking to grow — Malaaz is for you.

installation.title: Buy Materials, Book the Installer
installation.subtitle: After purchasing your materials on Malaaz, book a certified installer from our network — transparent pricing, quality guaranteed.
installation.feature1Desc: Every technician passed a rigorous technical test by the Malaaz team.
installation.feature2Desc: Installation price set upfront. No surprises, no negotiation.
installation.feature3Desc: Any installation defect within 6 months — we fix it free.
installation.successMsg: Thank you! You'll be among the first notified when the installation service launches.

traderPage.heroTitle:
Your products in the hands
of every Egyptian building a home
traderPage.heroSub: Whether you are a large distributor or a local shop — Malaaz opens a new market for you and digitizes your operations.
traderPage.feat1Desc: Your stock appears on the app the moment you update it. Zero delay, zero errors.
traderPage.feat2Desc: 72 hours without internet. Your data syncs automatically when connection returns.
traderPage.feat3Desc: Homeowners entering Malaaz are ready to buy, not just browse.
traderPage.feat4Desc: Dashboard showing your top-selling products and demand trends in your area.
traderPage.feat5Desc: Receive digital payments via Paymob directly through the app.
traderPage.feat6Desc: A dedicated support team answers your questions at any time.
traderPage.howTitle: Three steps to list your products
traderPage.how1Desc: Your business details and a photo of your commercial register — verification within 24 hours.
traderPage.how2Desc: Upload products via Excel or directly from Malaaz's POS app.
traderPage.how3Desc: Every order reaches you on the app the moment the customer confirms — with delivery details.
traderPage.distributorSub: Tailored to your volume and needs
traderPage.tq1: Who owns my data and inventory?
traderPage.ta1: You own your data entirely. Malaaz does not sell your data or share it with competitors. You can export all your data at any time.
traderPage.tq2: How is my product pricing set?
traderPage.ta2: You set all prices yourself. Malaaz does not interfere with pricing. Our commission applies only to sales made through the platform.
traderPage.ta3: Commission is 5-8% on each sale made through the platform. No fees on sales made outside the platform or through the POS only.
traderPage.ta4: Currently cash on delivery. Coming soon: direct bank transfer or Paymob — we will notify you when it launches.
traderPage.tq5: Does the system work without internet?
traderPage.ta5: Yes. The POS works fully offline for 72 hours. Data syncs automatically when internet returns.
traderPage.ta6: 24 to 48 hours after uploading required documents: ID photo + commercial register photo if available.
traderPage.ta7: Yes — the Large Distributor plan supports unlimited branches. The Local Trader plan supports one branch.
traderPage.tq8: What if I want to cancel?
traderPage.ta8: You can cancel at any time. Data export is free and permanent. No hidden cancellation fees.
traderPage.distributorCardDesc: Monthly sales volume 200K+ EGP or distributing to 50+ traders
traderPage.localCardDesc: Local shop or warehouse selling directly to individuals or contractors
traderPage.successMsg: We received your registration. One of our advisors will contact you within 24 hours to complete onboarding.
traderPage.successWhatsApp: Chat with us on WhatsApp now

faq.title: Have a question?
faq.q1: When will the app be available?
faq.a1: We are in active development and targeting the first beta launch in 2025. Register now to be among the first users.
faq.a2: Yes. Homeowners use the AI assistant and marketplace completely free.
faq.q3: How do I know the products are genuine?
faq.a3: Every product on Malaaz passes documented quality tests. We run burn, mechanical, and electrical tests weekly and livestream them.
faq.a4: Absolutely. A local trader gets a full POS and inventory system for just 500 EGP per month, with free visibility on the platform.
faq.a5: We start with Greater Cairo then expand to all governorates. Our goal is full Egypt coverage within the first year.
faq.a6: Yes. Malaaz is designed from the ground up for the Egyptian market — Arabic-first interface and AI that understands local context.
faq.q7: How does the trader system work without internet?
faq.a7: The POS works offline for up to 72 hours. Data syncs automatically to the cloud when the connection returns.
faq.q8: What makes Malaaz different from a regular shopping site?
faq.a8: Malaaz is not a store. It is a smart engineer that calculates your exact needs then connects you with the best product and closest trader. A regular store only sells — Malaaz guides, saves, and guarantees.
